cases.title: BRD §1.7 organizer uploads cover; participant sees cover on event list and detail
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1
Draft or editable event owned by organizer scope
Valid OrganizerAdmin JWT
Valid JPEG, PNG, or WebP image file under 5 MB
Participant JWT or public read access per GET /events and GET /events/{eventId} policy
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image as multipart/form-data with image file and OrganizerAdmin bearer token
GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 as participant and locate the event in items
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} as participant and read coverImageUrl
GET coverImageUrl (or GET /api/v1/media/events/{key}) to fetch image bytes
cases.expected: Upload succeeds and persists cover_image_key; paginated list item includes coverImageUrl when key is set; event detail includes same coverImageUrl; media endpoint returns HTTP 200 with correct image Content-Type and bytes matching upload — satisfies BRD AC-17 acceptance criterion and MVP event media scope

cases.title: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image returns success and persists cover metadata
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1
Draft or editable event owned by organizer scope
Valid OrganizerAdmin JWT
Valid JPEG, PNG, or WebP image file under 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image as multipart/form-data with image file and OrganizerAdmin bearer token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} with organizer or public read token per endpoint policy
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 or 201; event row persists cover_image_key and cover_image_updated_at; GET event detail response includes non-null coverImageUrl pointing to controlled media path per API design §2.7

cases.title: GET /api/v1/events list and detail include coverImageUrl; GET /media/events/{key} serves image
preconditions: Published event with cover_image_key set via organizer upload
Participant JWT or public list/detail access per API policy
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 as participant and locate the seeded event
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} and read coverImageUrl from response
GET the coverImageUrl (or GET /api/v1/media/events/{key} derived from key)
cases.expected: List item includes coverImageUrl when cover_image_key is set; detail includes coverImageUrl; media GET returns HTTP 200 with correct Content-Type (image/jpeg, image/png, or image/webp) and image bytes matching upload

cases.title: Organizer uploads cover in event form; participant sees 16:9 thumbnail on list and hero on detail
preconditions: Web app running with organizer event create/edit form and participant discovery pages
OrganizerAdmin logged in; participant session available or public browse enabled
Valid image file for file picker
steps: As OrganizerAdmin, open create or edit event form, select cover image via file picker, observe preview, and save/upload
As participant, navigate to event discovery list (paginated card grid)
Open the same event detail page
cases.expected: Organizer form shows upload progress and preview per FR-35; participant event card renders 16:9 cover thumbnail via next/image; event detail header renders cover hero; uploaded image visible on both surfaces per AC-17 and event-specific components spec

cases.title: Event media module replaces existing cover_image_key in real DB transaction
preconditions: Event already has cover_image_key from prior upload in Postgres
OrganizerAdmin JWT with write scope on event
Second valid image file (different content) under 5 MB
Integration test harness with transaction rollback per test
steps: Record current cover_image_key and cover_image_updated_at from events table
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with replacement file via media service/repository
Query events row and media storage for new key and file bytes
cases.expected: cover_image_key and cover_image_updated_at update atomically in database; new media endpoint serves replacement bytes; prior key superseded or removed per storage policy; module-integration boundary exercises real DB + filesystem persistence

cases.title: DELETE cover-image clears cover_image_key at DB and storage boundary
preconditions: Event with existing cover_image_key persisted in Postgres
OrganizerAdmin JWT with write scope
Integration test harness with transaction rollback per test
steps: DELETE /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with OrganizerAdmin bearer token
Query events table for cover_image_key and cover_image_updated_at
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} and GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12
cases.expected: DELETE succeeds; cover_image_key cleared in database; GET detail and list responses omit coverImageUrl or return null; storage file removed or orphaned per policy; UI falls back to neutral placeholder per event-specific components spec

cases.title: Cover images served only from controlled GET /media/events/{key} storage path
preconditions: Event with uploaded cover and known storage key under UPLOADS_DIR
No direct filesystem URL exposure
Integration test harness with real uploads directory
steps: Upload cover and capture cover_image_key via media module
GET /api/v1/media/events/{key} with valid key
Attempt to access raw filesystem path or traversal variants (e.g. ../) via media route
cases.expected: Valid key returns image from controlled handler; path traversal or arbitrary file access rejected with HTTP 400 or 404; storage confined to configured uploads directory per NFR-18

cases.title: Cover upload rejects files exceeding 5 MB maximum size
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event
Valid MIME image file larger than 5 MB (or boundary test fixture)
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with oversized file as multipart upload
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with stable invalid-input error code; no cover_image_key persisted; event detail coverImageUrl unchanged if prior cover absent

cases.title: Participant cannot upload or delete event cover image
preconditions: Editable event in organizer scope
Valid OrganizerAdmin JWT and separate Participant JWT
Valid image file under 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with OrganizerAdmin token — confirm success baseline
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with Participant token only
DELETE /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with Participant token only
cases.expected: OrganizerAdmin mutating requests succeed; Participant-only POST and DELETE return HTTP 403 unauthorized; cover_image_key unchanged by participant attempts; sensitive media mutation gated per roles matrix (create/edit event draft: OrganizerAdmin only)

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied cover upload on create/edit event
preconditions: Draft event in OrganizerAdmin organizing unit
OrganizerStaff JWT assigned to event scope
Valid image file under 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with OrganizerStaff bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 unauthorized; no cover_image_key written; roles matrix restricts create/edit event draft to OrganizerAdmin only

cases.title: Unauthenticated POST /events/{eventId}/cover-image returns 401
preconditions: Existing event eligible for cover upload
No Authorization header on request
Valid image file under 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image without bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; no cover_image_key written; consistent typed error envelope with requestId per API error contract

cases.title: Invalid MIME type upload rejected before persistence
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT
Non-image file (e.g. application/pdf or text/plain) presented as upload
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with disallowed file type
cases.expected: HTTP 400 invalid input; cover_image_key remains null or unchanged; no file stored under uploads path; only image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp allowed per API design §2.7

cases.title: Event without cover shows neutral placeholder on list and detail
preconditions: Published event with cover_image_key null
Participant browsing discovery and detail pages
steps: Navigate to participant event discovery list
Open event detail for event without cover
cases.expected: Event card and detail header render neutral placeholder illustration instead of broken image; no coverImageUrl-dependent fetch errors; next/image fallback behavior per UI spec §Event card and Event detail header

cases.title: Cover upload for event outside organizer scope returns 403 or 404
preconditions: Event owned by organizing unit A
OrganizerAdmin JWT scoped only to unit B
Valid image file under 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image as OrganizerAdmin B with valid image file
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per scope rules; no cover_image_key change on target event

cases.title: DELETE cover-image on event without cover is idempotent or returns clear not-found
preconditions: Event with cover_image_key null in Postgres
OrganizerAdmin JWT with write scope
steps: DELETE /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}
cases.expected: DELETE returns success or stable 404 without error side effects; event remains without coverImageUrl; no orphan storage writes

cases.title: Cover upload at exactly 5 MB boundary accepted; just over 5 MB rejected
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT and editable event without cover
Fixtures: valid WebP at 5_000_000 bytes and at 5_000_001 bytes
steps: POST cover-image with 5 MB file
DELETE cover-image to reset
POST cover-image with 5 MB + 1 byte file
cases.expected: At-limit file uploads successfully with HTTP 200 or 201; over-limit file returns HTTP 400; boundary enforced consistently per API max 5 MB contract
